headline: Oil Prices Rise, S&P 500 Futures Fall As Reserve Plans Offset Mine Fears
summary: Oil prices remained in a holding pattern early Wednesday as plans for a joint release of emergency petroleum reserves moved forward offset fears that the Strait of Hormuz could remain closed indefinitely amid concerns that Iranian vessels are laying mines.  S&P 500 futures rose slightly, helped by a strong earnings report from Oracle.  The International Energy Agency has recommended the release of a record 400 million barrels of oil by its 32-member nations, according to The Wall Street Journal.

headline: Refiners Are Quiet Winners in 2026: Wall Street’s Signals Are Hard to Ignore
summary: Institutional money is moving into U.S. refiners with conviction, and the earnings data backs it up. Marathon Petroleum (NYSE: MPC), Phillips 66 (NYSE: PSX), and Valero Energy (NYSE: VLO), have all surged roughly 31% to 40% year-to-date as of March 11, 2026, yet analyst consensus ratings have not kept pace with where institutions are positioning. ... Refiners Are Quiet Winners in 2026: Wall Street’s Signals Are Hard to Ignore

headline: Here's the inflation breakdown for February 2026 — in one chart

headline: Valero Energy (VLO) Valuation Check After Strong Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: What Valero Energy’s recent performance signals for investors With no single headline event driving markets today, Valero Energy (VLO) is drawing attention because of its recent share performance and fundamentals, prompting investors to reassess how this large refiner fits into their portfolios. See our latest analysis for Valero Energy. Valero Energy’s recent 30-day share price return of 7.08% and 90-day gain of 23.31% add to a 31.28% year to date share price return and 1-year total...
